On the Basis of Sex (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $24,704,837Details
International Box Office $14,076,051
Worldwide Box Office $38,780,888
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,636,601
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,120,415
Total $2,757,016
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A true story that follows young lawyer Ruth Bader Ginsburg as she teams with her husband Marty to bring a groundbreaking case before the U.S. Court of Appeals and overturn a century of gender discrimination.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$686,355 (2.8% of total gross)
Legs:4.07 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:33 opening theaters/1,957 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $32,268,319

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2018 (Limited) by Focus Features
January 11th, 2019 (Expands Wide) by Focus Features
September 25th, 2020 (Special Engagement) by Focus Features
International Releases: November 23rd, 2018 (Wide), released as On The Basis Of Sex (Australia)
December 28th, 2018 (Wide), released as Eşitlik Savaşçısı (Turkey)
January 2nd, 2019 (Wide) (Switzerland (French Speaking))
January 2nd, 2019 (Wide) (France)
January 9th, 2019 (Wide) (West Indies)
Video Release: March 26th, 2019 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some language and suggestive content.
(Rating bulletin 2529 (Cert #51616), 5/30/2018)
Running Time: 118 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Black List Graduates, Intertitle
Plot point: Biography, Discrimination, Feminism, Lawyers
Social setting: Supreme Court
Subgenre: Courtroom / Legal Drama
Time period setting: 1950s, 1970s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Participant Media, Robert Cort Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
